nasb.text: Then the days of Adam after he became the father of Seth were eight hundred years, and he had other sons and daughters.

esv.text: The days of Adam after he fathered Seth were 800 years; and he had other sons and daughters.

cnv.text: 亞當生塞特以後，還活了八百年，並且生了其他的兒女。

ccb.text: 亚当生了塞特以后，又活了八百年，生儿育女，

csbs.text: 亚当生了塞特之后，他的年日又有八百年，并且生了其他的儿女。
